item.title: Weekly Summary 2026-W15
item.description: The first two days of this week (W15 opening) focused on two main threads: planning and executing three editorial annotations for the MIHD paper draft, discovering the core new argument of ‘clustering-retrieval tradeoff’ through actual HD immune microenvironment analysis and completing three new cross-section RM-IDEAL benchmark experiments; simultaneously conducting a comprehensive review of website/update.sh, fixing 4 script bugs and helping set up a complete Hugo deployment environment, restoring the website publishing pipeline from continuous failures (exit 1/127/128) to all 7 steps passing.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-07
item.description: Fixed 4 script bugs in website/update.sh and set up a complete Hugo deployment environment, recovering the website update pipeline from total failure to all 7 steps passing; also initiated a full daily/weekly report MCP sync workflow

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-06
item.description: Completed planning and execution of three editorial annotation tasks for the MIHD paper draft, including rewriting Intro P1, expanding Abstract and R5/R6, while running three new cross-section query experiments and fixing HD Niche Query visualization

item.title: 每周总结 2026-W14
item.description: 本周有三条任务同时在进行中：一是准备MIHD多模态空间转录组相关论文（耗时5天，地点DCC）；二是完成TEDDY全量嵌入基准测试、Leiden对比实验以及HD融合评估，并撰写双语论文框架，从而确定“零样本FM嵌入融合”这一差异化研究方向；三是对TokenMonitor Linux FloatBall进行系统性修复（耗时5天），通过多轮迭代从症状修复发展到固定窗口+GDK Input Shape架构重构，同时完成了PR #4中全部21项代码审查问题；四是对整个Life-Copilot Discord Bot进行重构（耗时2天），共删除了2823行代码，引入了多CLI Agent架构，并实现了屏幕时间追踪、飞书输入渠道以及MCP工具集成等多项新功能。此外，还完成了NeurIPS 2025 D&B Track的63篇论文调研工作，并搭建了新的Linux工作站环境。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-05
item.description: Completed architectural refactor of Linux FloatBall to fixed-window + GDK Input Shape to eliminate platform-level geometry offsets, and systematically resolved two root-cause issues in Life-Copilot Discord Bot: missing structured logging and MCP tool permission denial

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-04
item.description: Deep debugging and fixing multiple system-level bugs in TokenMonitor FloatBall on Linux (GTK size negotiation root cause, WM clamp positioning offset, etc.), completing a systematic research survey of 63 NeurIPS 2025 D&B Track papers, major Life-Copilot feature launches (Discord Bot architecture refactor with net -2823 lines, full Screen Time Tracker implementation, Feishu Bot for quick idea capture, Codex/Anthropic backend integration), and exploring AionUI remote SSH access feasibility.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-03
item.description: MIHD project completed HD fusion experiment reruns, paper narrative restructuring, and bilingual skeleton writing, establishing the differentiated research positioning of zero-shot FM embedding fusion; TokenMonitor fixed float ball Rust compilation errors and continued Linux GTK window positioning bug fixes; Gadget completed two rounds of rclone bidirectional sync and investigated NIPS research data location

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-02
item.description: Dual-device parallel progress: DCC completed MIHD paper experiment scaffolding (GPU Slurm scripts + three visualization scripts); DesktopLinux fixed TokenMonitor platform bugs on Linux/Wayland, resolved all 21 code review issues from PR #4 and pushed to GitHub, and completed gadget environment initialization and Claude Code development toolchain setup on the new machine.

item.title: 错误日志 2026-04-01
item.description: DCC端完成了Leiden全量对比实验（核心结论：高质量的嵌入方式优于聚类方法的选择），并创建了HD niche query可视化界面；DesktopLinux端则负责新Linux工作站的初始化设置，以及TokenMonitor Tauri的构建工作。此外，通过两轮迭代修复，解决了悬浮球在Linux上的位置变化问题，以及收起残影时的跨平台兼容性问题。

item.title: Monthly Summary 2026-03
item.description: This month’s work was highly focused on the MIHD spatial transcriptomics multimodal clustering research project: after completing environment initialization on the DCC HPC cluster, we systematically integrated the TEDDY-G 400M foundation model, Leiden clustering algorithm, and STHD pathology annotation Ground Truth. Multi-encoder benchmarks revealed STAIG framework’s high robustness to gene encoders and the systematic transfer loss of Foundation Models on clustering tasks. The paper’s Fig 1–6 framework was finalized, marking the project’s transition from the experimental phase to the paper-writing phase.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-31
item.description: Completed this week’s work plan for the MIHD paper, integrated Leiden clustering and STHD Ground Truth, successfully ran DLPFC Leiden baseline and HD full-pipeline evaluation, obtaining key experimental data

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-30
item.description: Completed TEDDY-G 400M gene foundation model embedding extraction across all 11 DLPFC slices with multi-strategy fusion benchmarking, and wrote the W13 weekly report summarizing last week’s experimental findings.

item.title: Weekly Summary 2026-W13
item.description: This week’s core work focused on multi-model embedding expansion and issue triage for the MIHD spatial transcriptomics project. On March 23, environment initialization was completed on the DCC HPC cluster, and historical challenges in the MIHD project were systematically documented — for the first time structuring the root cause of cross-section retrieval failure (incomparable embedding spaces) and the single-section ARI gap as formal documents. On March 29, four critical bugs in the TEDDY foundation model extraction script were successfully fixed, the first DLPFC section embedding extraction was completed, and batch runs were launched, establishing the foundation for a multi-model comparison benchmark.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-29
item.description: Analyzed the TEDDY single-cell foundation model paper on an HPC cluster, fixed 4 critical bugs in the existing extraction script, and successfully deployed embedding extraction for the DLPFC dataset.

item.title: 错误日志 2026-03-28
item.description: The entire process was carried out concurrently on two devices, tianhe and TzJsDesktop, across four projects. On tianhe, the implementation of Context Replay concept refactoring and code fixes for error_recovery_benchmark was completed. Additionally, issues related to missing assets in the LIBERO/BOSS evaluation environment, as well as zero-shot design analysis, were resolved. On TzJsDesktop, the integration of the intelligent dual-track instrumentation architecture for cchypothesis skill was completed. Moreover, four progressive bug fixes were carried out for TokenMonitor applications, including dashboard jitter issues, Rust compilation errors, front-end import failures, and window anchoring problems.

item.title: 错误日志 2026-03-27
item.description: 我们统一了机器人评估脚本的日志和结果保存逻辑，并完全实现了cchypothesis假设驱动调试功能。同时，通过五轮迭代，我们彻底解决了TokenMonitor窗口底部出现抖动的问题。

item.title: 错误日志 2026-03-26
item.description: The process is carried out concurrently across three devices: DCC HPC, Tianhe Supercomputer, and TzJsDesktop. On DCC, the MIHD-QueST cross-sample query protocol has been finalized, along with the construction of a benchmark framework for 8 gene encoders. At Tianhe, the full task rollout evaluation of Pi0.5 LoRA has been completed, along with the migration to the BOSS environment and a systematic reconstruction of the Error Recovery Benchmark. TzJsDesktop has undergone multiple system upgrades to improve ccplan skills (Prompt Calibration, multi-intention decomposition, Feature Guard), and TokenMonitor has undergone significant feature improvements (full lifecycle of floating balls, Windows native UX, code refactoring, integration with ccusage).

item.title: 错误日志 2026-03-25
item.description: Tianhe server has successfully completed the construction of the entire VLA/robotics research technology stack for multiple users (Git migration, training scripts, data pipeline repairs, OpenPI evaluation client). TzJsDesktop has carried out modular refactoring of research_scout.py, adapted TokenMonitor for cross-platform use, built the first Windows .exe version, extended optimize skill across four languages, and carefully configured the Claude Code toolchain.

item.title: bug journal 2026-03-24
item.description: TzJsDesktop完成了gadget summarize模块的重构工作（将2930行代码整合到8个模块以及72个测试中），同时实现了summarize skill功能的升级，使其更加符合论文中的六章结构描述。此外，ccplan工具链也得到了全面修复。另外，TokenMonitor的架构规划也已完成，它从原本仅适用于macOS的平台扩展到了跨平台环境，并且已经启动了Phase A/E阶段的实现工作。tianhe则负责创建BOSS基准代码库CLAUDE.md文件，并解决了LiPM训练器中的5个bug问题。不过，由于API连接出现故障，他们的工作在上午中断了大约6小时。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-23
item.description: Completed environment initialization on the DCC HPC cluster (rclone sync, GPU node survey, skill installation), and documented current issues for the MIHD research project.

item.title: 每周总结 2026-W12
item.description: This week, we worked across three devices: DCC, tianhe, and TzJsDesktop. We conducted comprehensive research in two key areas: robotic operations and spatial transcriptomics. The Error Recovery Benchmark project was completed from design of the collection scheme (329 demo cases for RBG grouping) to architectural-level trajectory segmentation using InteractionSegmenter. In total, 1,627 training scenarios were generated, covering 148 subtypes, representing a 35% increase in data coverage. MIHD spatial transcriptomics further improved by integrating cross-slice embedding techniques, establishing scGPT’s zero-shot advantage with a 100% accuracy rate compared to UNI2’s 71%. For π₀.₅, we completed the full-chain training of the detection head, achieving an error rate of approximately 0.253. We also developed five conditioning strategies for Exp5-9 scenarios. The gadget toolchain was upgraded toopus+max thinking, with improvements in Research Profiler architecture, unified deployment of websites, and full upgrades for ECC devices. This week’s key breakthroughs focused on “identifying and resolving root causes at the architectural level”: issues such as non-comparability between per-section PCA coordinate systems, ambiguity in target_object classification for multiple objects, and compatibility between Flax NNX inheritance and combination techniques were all fundamentally resolved this week.

item.title: 缺陷日志 2026-03-22
item.description: 天和集群已成功修复了错误恢复基准测试中的三项核心问题（爪子极性反转、wrong_object过滤逻辑错误、drop_with_interaction注入策略）。训练场景的数量也从1209增加到1627（+35%），同时深入分析了three_piece_assembly相位检测退化的根本原因，以及48个ungenerable cases的物理约束因素。此外，TzJsDesktop系统还完成了批量归档W05-W12历史周报的工作，修复了gadget网站部署过程中的问题，并完成了Hugo站点的导航下拉菜单的改造，同时统一构建了staging环境的架构。

item.title: 错误日志 2026-03-21
item.description: 在天津HPC集群中，已经完成了error_recovery_benchmark函数的全链路修复工作：从参数调优到架构级轨迹分段重构，共涉及1222个训练场景。同时，在TzJsDesktop中修复了gadget基础设施的关键漏洞，并将ECC工具链升级至opus+maxthinking版本。

item.title: 错误日志 2026-03-20
item.description: 在DCC和tianhe这两台HPC设备上，我们同步推进了四条主要任务：首先，修复error recovery benchmark中的drop_in_transit假阳性问题；其次，通过32个worker并行处理，生成了6个任务的973个训练场景（耗时41分钟）；第三，构建Pi0.5-base LoRA六任务合并数据集的微调流水线（数据转换和normalization已完成，训练因Slurm job到期而中断）；第四，修复STAIG超参数扫描的不公平问题，并建立了PCA+UNI/UNI2基准测试（AUC 0.47）；最后，开发了10x Visium空间转录组数据的scanpy分析脚本。

item.title: 错误日志 2026-03-19
item.description: Today’s AI Conversation Summary

item.title: 错误日志 2026-03-18
item.description: Cross-DCC, Tianhe, and local devices are working together to advance four research lines simultaneously. In DCC, we have completed the end-to-end implementation of MIHD cross-slice Embedding alignment and batch effect evaluation systems. In Tianhe, we have successfully launched the training of π₀.₅ task detection heads, fixed the issue with missing manip_progress records in the VLA evaluation pipeline, and completed the repairs for the LIBERO environment along with the design of experiments from Exp5 to Exp9. Locally, we have implemented batch task status updates for CalendarPro, thereby addressing the core defects in high-frequency daily interactions.

item.title: 错误日志 2026-03-17
item.description: 在DCC端，我们对MIHD多模态空间转录组项目进行了代码重构，解决了9个相关问题，并更新了相关文档。在tianhe端，多位研究员同时完成了robobrain_pi任务状态机的修复工作，以及训练损失值的分离监控、LIBERO测试套件的集成验证、error recovery benchmark 2920场景数据的质量检查、CALVIN格式转换脚本的修复、GPU监控工具的去重处理以及键盘导航功能的新增。此外，还确认了RoboCasa MimicGen预训练数据下载的上游原因。

item.title: Enes Eken — 研究人员分析报告
item.description: Enes Eken의 학문적 경력은 세 단계로 나뉩니다. 첫 번째 단계는 2014년부터 2018년까지였습니다. 이 기간 동안 그는 스핀 트랜스폼 메모리(STT-RAM)의 신뢰성 설계에 집중했습니다. 특히, 읽기/쓰기 성능 향상, 변동 감지 시뮬레이션 도구, 그리고 오류 수정 코드 관련 기술을 크게 발전시켰습니다. 이 시기에 발표된 논문들이 그의 가장 중요한 연구 성과였습니다.

item.title: Fan Chen — Research Analyst Report
item.description: Fan Chen: 在这个数据集中，“Fan Chen”很可能指的是多位同名研究者的合并记录，而非单一学者的完整研究轨迹。根据论文内容来看，可以明显区分出至少两类截然不同的研究者：（1）一位长期从事分析化学/食品化学研究的学者，其研究活动持续了1992年至2022年，研究领域从早期的法医气相色谱技术发展到了……

item.title: Hsin-Pai Cheng — Research Analyst Report
item.description: Hsin-Pai Cheng is a researcher specializing in efficient AI systems and edge-based deployments. His academic journey can be divided into three distinct stages. From 2016 to 2018, he focused on the IBM TrueNorth neuromorphic computing platform, conducting deep research into the quantization of neural networks under hardware constraints, as well as aspects related to adversarial robustness. He also made significant contributions to the field of “computational capabilities”.

item.title: Ismail Bayram — Research Analyst Report
item.description: Ismail Bayram是一位在土耳其农业/兽医科学领域具有实际经验的研究者，他的研究生涯贯穿了1999年至2025年这段时间。他的核心研究方向是家禽（鹌鹑、肉鸡、蛋鸡）和反刍动物（绵羊、水牛、奶牛）的营养科学问题。他的学术生涯始于基础饲料添加剂的开发与研究，包括益生菌、维生素以及鱼粉替代品的研发。

item.title: Jiachen Mao — 研究人员分析报告
item.description: Jiachen Mao: Jiachen Mao的学术轨迹非常独特，他经历了多次跨领域的转型，很难用传统的“领域专家/新星”框架来描述他的学术成就。在2015年至2018年期间，他的主要研究成果集中在建筑能耗模拟和城市微气候领域。他在高层建筑通风、能耗校准优化以及城市热岛效应分析等方面发表了多篇有价值的论文。

item.title: Jie Guo — Researchers' Analysis Report
item.description: Jie Guo: It is necessary to point out a key issue: based on the actual content of the paper list, this does not represent the academic trajectory of a single researcher. Instead, it is the result of incorrect aggregation of data from multiple researchers with the same name (Guo Jie/Guo Jie). The papers with high citations between 2000 and 2005 (with a total of over 2000 citations) originated from a scholar who focused on ** Adolescent Substance Abuse and Social Development**.

item.title: Jun Lu — Researchers' Analysis Report
item.description: Jun Lu: Jun Lu’s academic career can be divided into two distinct phases. The first phase (1989–2013) was dedicated to numerical calculations of electromagnetic fields, with a particular focus on the Harmonic Balance Finite Element Method and the design of high-frequency planar transformers. During this period, he established a solid theoretical foundation in the field of nonlinear magnetic field analysis. The key turning point occurred around 2013–2015.

item.title: Kent W. Nixon — 研究者分析报告
item.description: Kent W. Nixon — 早期研究者

item.title: L. Teng — Research Analyst Report
item.description: L. Teng的学术生涯呈现出高度碎片化的特征。他的论文涵盖了多个完全不同的领域，包括胶质瘤治疗、心脏干细胞、NADPH氧化酶与血管生物学、海洋模式生物的免疫学，以及GaAs量子阱的自旋弛豫等不相容的学科。这一特点表明，这位署名者实际上是由多位不同的研究者共同完成的成果（即所谓的“同名合并问题”）。如果聚焦于他的某个特定领域的话……

item.title: Linghao Song — 研究人员分析报告
item.description: Linghao Song is a researcher specializing in computer architecture. His research focuses on memory-based computing as the core theme throughout his work. In 2017, he won the Best Paper Award for his work on ReRAM-based graph processing accelerators. This achievement laid the foundation for his future contributions in this field.

item.title: Nathan Inkawhich — 研究分析师报告
item.description: Nathan Inkawhich is a researcher who specializes in tackling the intersection of machine learning and SAR (Synthetic Aperture Radar) remote sensing recognition technologies. Since 2017, he has been working on both defense/remote sensing applications and deep learning security. His academic career reached its peak during 2019-2020, when he presented papers at CVPR and NeurIPS.

item.title: Wu Lin — Researchers' Analysis Report
item.description: Wu Lin: It should be noted that there is a significant issue of confusion regarding the names of these researchers. “Wu Lin” is a common Chinese name, and the database contains the research achievements of at least five researchers with similar names from different fields: ① Plant Soil Ecologists (regulatory mechanisms/rhizosphere microorganisms, 2001-2025, forming the core focus); ② Computer Vision Researchers (person recognition, 2

item.title: Xiangliu Chen — Research Analyst Report
item.description: Xiangliu Chen — Early researcher

item.title: Xiaoxiao Liu — 研究人员分析报告
item.description: Xiaoxiao Liu: It should be noted that there is a significant name ambiguity problem in this paper list. The papers cover a wide range of unrelated fields, including cancer biology, GPU architecture, plant immunity, hyperspectral image processing, genomics, and LLM prompt engineering. Clearly, these papers were contributed by multiple researchers with the same name.

item.title: Xiongfei Yu — Research Analyst Report
item.description: Xiongfei Yu的学术生涯展现出了罕见的跨领域发展模式，其研究成果很可能是由多位同名研究者共同贡献而成的。第一阶段（1996—2004年）他的研究主要集中在石油工程领域，涉及气藏凝析气预测、CO₂注入以提高采收率的技术，以及注气储层筛选与评价等方面的工作。

item.title: Yan Yang — 研究者分析报告
item.description: Yan Yang — 早期研究者

item.title: Yanyan Chen — Research Analyst Report
item.description: Yanyan Chen: Warning! The academic profile of “Yanyan Chen” suffers from a serious name disambiguation issue. It is highly likely that Semantic Scholar has combined several researchers with the name “Yanyan Chen” into one profile.

item.title: Yingying Huang — Research Analyst Report
item.description: Yingying Huang: 从论文列表来看，这位名为“Yingying Huang”的人极有可能是多个同名人士的数据合并结果，而非单一研究者的学术成果。这些论文涵盖了化学生物学领域（DNA与小分子相互作用、天然产物研究）、等离子体物理学领域（GS重建），凝聚态物理领域（VO₂相变研究），表面物理学领域，以及机器学习/

item.title: Yiran Chen — Researchers' Analysis Report
item.description: Yiran Chen: Yiran Chen’s academic journey can be divided into three distinct stages. The first stage (2003-2007) focused on optimizing the power consumption of traditional computer architectures, with deterministic clock gating being a key technique used in VLSI design. This period marked his solid foundation in this field. The second stage (2008-2015) saw him turning to emerging storage technologies as his research focus.

item.title: Yongfeng Ding — Research Analyst Report
item.description: Yongfeng Ding is an emerging researcher in the early stages of their academic career. They began publishing papers in 2023, and currently have only four publications to their name. Therefore, they do not yet possess the characteristics of a ’leading expert in the field’. However, they have demonstrated certain levels of originality in the area of quantitative analysis of composite materials’ microstructure. Their key contributions focus on the concept of ‘randomness’, which was introduced by them in 2023.

item.title: 错误日志 2026-03-16
item.description: Parallel processing is carried out across three devices: DCC, tianhe, and TzJsDesktop. On DCC, spatial transcriptomics analysis across slides has been completed using the scGPT algorithm with a 100% accuracy rate. Additionally, dual-language documentation has been generated. On tianhe, the design of a collection scheme for 329 VLA errors has been finalized, along with the implementation of the entire pipeline. The bug related to CompositeBodyObject objects has been fixed, and batch error scene generation has been initiated. On TzJsDesktop, academic profiles of over 20 researchers have been processed in batches. Two rounds of code refactoring have been performed on Research Profiler, resulting in a systematic fix for S2 disambiguation errors. Moreover, the h-index of renowned professors has been accurately identified.

item.title: 每周总结 2026-W11
item.description: This week, six projects were carried out concurrently on three devices: DCC, tianhe, and TzJsDesktop. The projects include the following key tasks: ① MIHD spatial transcriptomics identified fundamental flaws in the cross-sample embedding methodology (independent processing per section leads to non-comparable feature spaces), and efforts are underway to fix these issues. ② ErrorRecoveryBenchmark improved from bug fixes to a comprehensive scale-up, covering 13 skills/29 subtypes. The project also addressed the issue of objects not falling when dropping skills, and after identifying limitations in online quota architectures, a new approach for offline injection was established. ③ VLA-RoboTwin/pi05 completed the entire process from environment setup, training performance optimization (JAX version alignment, 33% speed improvement) to data collection, and auxiliary task experiments. ④ The gadget toolchain upgraded its architecture to include MCP Server, common/shared packages, and unified output directories. Research profilers enabled researchers to prioritize student discoveries on scholar pages. ⑤ CalendarPro underwent comprehensive optimization in 7 stages, with all 230 tests passing. Token consumption was reduced by 40-60%. ⑥ The gadget research toolchain integrated citation graph analysis and completed profiles of 7 renowned AI scholars.

item.title: Haiyong Wang — 研究者分析报告
item.description: Haiyong Wang — 早期研究者

item.title: バグレポート 2026-03-15
item.description: Throughout the day, six main tasks will be carried out across three devices simultaneously: identifying the root causes of the dual incompatibility between DCC diagnosis and MIHD cross-sample embedding; Tianhe will complete the repair of five failed skills in ErrorRecoveryBenchmark v5, E2 semantic splitting (13 skills/29 subtypes), v4 archiving, D0 scenario generation, and planning for v5.1. At the same time, efforts will be made to fix all aspects of the VLA progress prediction training pipeline and debug the compatibility of UniVLA containers. TzJsDesktop will complete seven stages of comprehensive optimization for CalendarPro (230 tests passed), unify the restructuring of common gadgets/outputs, improve student discovery on the research profiler homepage and Hugo deployment, as well as integrate the research toolchain with the CLI (reference diagram + support for three backend LLMs).

item.title: 缺陷记录表 2026-03-14
item.description: We have improved the interactive experience of the GPU monitoring tool. We have also completed the visualization of 50 robot demonstration datasets using four cameras. Additionally, we have designed and implemented an experimental framework for predicting operational progress in four scenarios within the pi05 VLA model.

item.title: 缺陷记录表 2026-03-13
item.description: 为RoboTwin Place Dual Shoes机器人任务添加了五个新的每帧数据变量，并且修复了两个与数据收集相关的错误。

item.title: 错误日志 2026-03-12
item.description: 正在天河服务器的上调试VLA机器人评估环境中的多层依赖问题，同时优化GPU监控工具的显示逻辑。

item.title: 错误日志 2026-03-11
item.description: 在DCC完成了MIHD输出目录的大规模重构工作，以及151673↔151508区间的RM-IDEAL基准测试；同时在tianhe平台上开发了K8s容器内GPU监控工具，并对pi05 VLA训练模块的性能瓶颈进行了系统诊断与修复。该模块的性能比openpi慢了33%，我们已调整了与之相关的6个关键依赖项的版本（包括JAX等）。

item.title: bug journal 2026-03-10
item.description: Today’s AI Dialogue Summary

item.title: 错误日志 2026-03-09
item.description: The process is being carried out concurrently on three devices: DCC, tianhe, and TzJsDesktop. The MIHD cross-modal enhancement module is being utilized for cross-sample evaluation with RM-IDEAL. Robot error recovery benchmarks are being generated using quota-based data generation methods (these approaches expose limitations in online architectures and provide a new direction for offline injection). Additionally, the VLA robot framework is being engineered (using UniVLA/Pi0/RoboTwin data pipelines). Finally, the gadget tool is being upgraded to an AI Agent-accessible MCP service, and it has been integrated with CalendarPro.

item.title: 每周总结 2026-W10
item.description: This week, we conducted parallel efforts across three devices: DCC, Tianhe Supercomputer, and TzJsDesktop. The main projects include space transcriptomics research, robot operation training/ evaluation, AI personal assistants, and paper management tools. The MIHD project completed the full set of scGPT+UNI2 integration experiments (QFormer avg ARI=0.370, +117% compared to scGPT-only), and established a zero-shot cross-sample evaluation framework. Pi0.5 LoRA fine-tuning achieved an overall success rate of 58.9%, significantly outperforming BC-RNN (0%). The VLA model was quantitatively validated to demonstrate its advantages. CalendarPro made a significant leap from passive response to active decision-making, achieving perfect results in 321 tests. Additionally, BackgroundCoordinator’s critical integration defects were identified and fixed. Gadget Research Scout went from zero build to production-ready status within a single day, completing two-stage LLM paper evaluation pipelines and providing three research directions for further exploration. Error_recovery_benchmark completed the cleanup of all 65 symlinks and established infrastructure for visualizing error scenarios in MP4 format. The most important engineering lessons learned this week are: successful testing does not mean system availability (integration layers must be verified independently), and it is essential to study the architecture of mature projects before designing Agent-based systems.

item.title: 错误日志 2026-03-08
item.description: On the Tianhe server, extensive refactoring of the error_recovery_benchmark was completed, including the cleanup of all 65 symlinks and the migration of code paths. Multitask error scenarios were also addressed through MP4 visualization and development of pre-error playback storage layers. Additionally, the implementation of the VLA-RoboTwin key area annotation system was progressed, along with fixes to Vulkan rendering issues. Various features were also added locally, such as author search functionality for the gadget research_scout.

item.title: 错误日志 2026-03-07
item.description: In just one day, we successfully completed the entire construction process of the Gadget Research Scout paper management system. We were able to identify three potential research directions for the first time. Additionally, we advanced the development of the CalendarPro intention classification system by conducting root cause analysis and designing cross-project architectural specifications (by introducing the OpenClaw context window management model). We also managed to process the backlog of daily reports that had been pending for three days.

item.title: 错误日志 2026-03-06
item.description: 三台设备同日进行并行推进：DCC完成了ContraVAE与STHD空间转录组数据归一化处理的工作，同时tianhe修复了RoboTwin评估流程中的三个连续问题（Vulkan渲染、数据类冻结、路径重复），并完成了Phoenix/FLARE全任务训练脚本套件的开发。TzJsDesktop编写了关于CalendarPro的1674行中文使用教程，并找到了Discord bot在跨消息上下文丢失方面的三大根本原因。

item.title: バグレポート 2026-03-05
item.description: Over the entire day, three devices—DCC/tianhe/TzJsDesktop—were utilized to simultaneously carry out four projects: DCC completed the MIHD multimodal dataset benchmark and established a zero-shot narrative framework; tianhe deployed the zhaoganlong framework with a nine-task training pipeline, initiating two parallel training processes. Additionally, issues related to Openpi-moe normalization were resolved, and the separation of the Phoenix/FLARE code base was finalized. On TzJsDesktop, CalendarPro was fully upgraded to become an intelligent personal assistant capable of autonomous perception and multi-agent orchestration (with 321 successful tests).

item.title: 错误日志 2026-03-04
item.description: DCC 对 QueST 空间转录组学论文中的跨样本查询与评估方法进行了深入分析；tianhe 完成了多项项目文档的更新工作（包括错误恢复基准全景总结.md 和 zhaoganlong 训练指南），同时负责排查 BC-RNN 模型零成功率的根本原因，并规划 an49 全任务训练所需的基础设施。

item.title: 错误日志 2026-03-03
item.description: 在DCC上完成了跨Section RM-IDEAL基准测试的实现，并与方法文档进行了对接。随后在天河超级计算集群上对Pi0.5 LoRA模型进行了全面评估，结果显示其性能优于BC-RNN模型（效率提升了58.9%）。此外，我们还确认了训练权重的来源，确认所有权重都使用了pi05_base模型。最后，我们成功恢复了第9个任务的训练过程。

item.title: 缺陷记录表 2026-03-02
item.description: DCC已经完成了scGPT+UNI2全套融合实验以及周报可视化工作，并识别出STAIG在构建关键架构时并未使用gene encoder的事实。此外，我们还成功地在天河双节点上管理了9个Pi0.5 LoRA训练任务，解决了eval pipeline中的多个关键问题（如websocket超时、JIT并发崩溃）。我们进一步分析了VLA推理过程中GPU利用率仅为10%的根本原因，并设计了批量并发eval优化方案。

item.title: 每周总结 2026-W09
item.description: This week, we have been working concurrently on two projects within the DCC and Tianhe clusters: Space Transcriptomics (MIHD) and the Error Recovery Benchmark. On the DCC side, we fixed a critical weight loading bug in scGPT, resulting in an average improvement of 44.4% for ARI tasks. We also extended the MIHD benchmark to the Visium HD dataset and completed a major refactoring of the code involving approximately 250,000 lines of code. On Tianhe, we established a new BC-RNN Phoenix training pipeline with 9 parallel tasks. We identified and fixed the root cause of the task distribution mismatch that led to zero success rates in the Pi0.5 evaluation. This led to key conclusions from the M14 baseline evaluation: the learning strategy achieved SR≈0% in error scenarios, proving the necessity of M15 LoRA fine-tuning. Additionally, we successfully stabilized the parallel fine-tuning of Pi0.5 LoRA on 6×A800 hardware.

item.title: 缺陷记录表 2026-03-01
item.description: 在DCC和tianhe这两台服务器上，我们同时推进了四个项目：DCC完成了VisiumHD的三种注释可视化处理以及STAIG融合多模态运行（Silhouette得分0.343），并对MIHD仓库进行了六阶段的大规模清理重构（删除了约250K条代码）；tianhe则完成了Pi0.5基础模型评估（SR率为4.2%），修复了Coffee BC-RNN中对象观测键缺失的问题，开发了BC-RNN Stack_D0错误场景生成流水线（修复了四层图像生成的11个场景问题），并在修复了四个启动错误之后，成功以6×A800 GPU的100%利用率来并行微调Pi0.5 LoRA任务。

item.title: 错误日志 2026-02-28
item.description: 在DCC上完成了MIHD项目Visium HD的全链路扩展工作（修改了8个文件），并且修复了scGPT关键权重加载相关的漏洞问题（修复程度达到了44.4%）。同时在tianhe平台上，从零开始实现了BC-RNN Phoenix的基线训练流程，并成功启动了9个任务的并行训练。此外，还完成了Pi0.5 Phoenix的首次评测部署工作（完成了7/9个任务）。

item.title: bug journal 2026-02-27
item.description: On the Tianhe HPC cluster, the storage space analysis was completed, and the process of applying for GPUs on Slurm nodes was finalized. The results of the M14 baseline evaluation confirmed that Pi0/BC-RNN achieved almost zero success rates in error recovery scenarios.

item.title: 缺陷日志 2026-02-26
item.description: On the supercomputer cluster, the BC-RNN training configuration was reverted to the image mode, and a successful 5-task parallel training was initiated. Additionally, the evaluation framework was extended to support 5 MimicGen tasks. It was also identified and resolved the issue of mismatch in task distribution, which resulted in a 0% success rate for Pi0.5.

item.title: 缺陷日志 2026-02-23
item.description: 在DCC节点系统中，我们优化了MIHD空间组学融合训练过程（包括3项CPU加速措施、架构解耦设计、全切片基准测试以及Vision Refine对比实验）。同时，在天河集群上完成了MimicGen数据的准备工作，修复了M14三路评估中的环境指纹崩溃问题，并解决了Pi0.5全量微调时出现的OOM问题。最终，成功将Pi0.5 LoRA训练任务（Job 46553）推进到稳定运行状态。

item.title: 每周总结 2026-W08
item.description: This week, we focused on the MIHD spatial transcriptomics project. We completed a systematic investigation into H&E Image-Only clustering (establishing a literature baseline for ARI values ranging from 0.11 to 0.16), implemented three self-supervised enhancement methods (SCAN improved ARI from 0.251 to 0.303, a +20.6% increase), and established a two-stage framework for Vision Refinement. Meanwhile, we continued to work on Error Recovery Benchmarking on the tianhe cluster (M14 evaluation of infrastructure, initialization of full-scenario evaluations with 649 scenarios). We also prepared the Phoenix pi0.5 data pipeline (storage of 18.4GB MimicGen dataset, training configuration ready). Throughout the week, we resolved several engineering issues, including STEGO NaN, dual normalization bugs, version conflicts with lerobot, and problems with HuggingFace proxies. The remaining issues related to Pi0.5 OOM and visualizing scenes via video verification will be addressed next week.

item.title: 缺陷日志 2026-02-22
item.description: DCC已经完成了MIHD项目的清理整顿工作，并实现了与Vision Refinement两阶段的融合实施。目前，批量实验正在全面推进中。同时，Tianhe公司也已经全面启动了Error Recovery Benchmark Phase II的工作（包括M14评估流水线验证以及Pi0.5版本的OOM诊断），并且已经完成Phoenix pi0.5版本的完整数据流水线的搭建工作（共9个MimicGen任务的数据被存储到系统中，总容量达到18.4GB；训练配置也已经准备就绪）。

item.title: 错误日志 2026-02-20
item.description: We have conducted specialized tests on the STAIG fusion module of the MIHD project. It was discovered that there is a double-normalization issue in eval_scan_fusion.py. Additionally, a caching mechanism for embeddings at the pipeline level was introduced in run_benchmark.py.

item.title: 缺陷记录表 2026-02-19
item.description: 在 MIHD项目中，系统完成了对仅基于图像的自聚类方法的文献调研（确立了ARI基线为0.11–0.16，并分析了Foundation Model失效的五大原因）。同时，我们编写了四份核心技术文档，并实现了三种自监督聚类增强方案（STEGO/BYOL+GAT/SCAN）。通过SCAN算法，仅基于图像的ARI值从0.251提升到了0.303（+20.6%）。

item.title: 每周总结 2026-W07
item.description: This week, we focused on three areas: robot simulation, bioinformatics, and toolchain development. In the error_recovery_benchmark project, deep blocking issues were encountered during force injection debugging (30N applied to the OSC controller had no noticeable effect), revealing fundamental problems with the controller’s compensation mechanisms. The MIHD project successfully completed the Chinese documentation for its enhancement plan. ccusage achieved support for GLM multi-model billing through type/form validation checks. Robobrain_pi confirmed that the training process is now ready for use. This week, AI revealed obvious pattern-matching defects in handling repeated errors (SSH lacking the cd command) and environmental assumptions (proxy, pnpm). Human intervention provided more effective debugging strategies during critical decision-making moments, such as extreme force testing, local GPU detection, and reusing existing pricing documents.

item.title: 缺陷记录表 2026-02-14
item.description: We have implemented a force injection enhancement scheme for the robotic arm’s error recovery benchmark, but a force of 30N still fails to produce any visible disturbance in the video. The issue remains unresolved.

item.title: 错误日志 2026-02-13
item.description: 请将 MIHD项目增强计划文档翻译成中文，并将其写入新的文件中。同时，请保留所有与占位符相关的内容，如token、URL、文件路径以及代码标识符。

item.title: 错误日志 2026-02-12
item.description: 在 Tianhe设备上完成了对 ccusage GLM 计费功能的代码实现和调试工作；而在 DCC设备上，则完成了 MIHD 增强计划的中文版本整理工作。

item.title: 错误日志 2026-02-10
item.description: 在三个项目中全面推进：为机器人基准测试项目完善贡献者文档；整理robobrain_pi的历史记录，并为SAC强化学习训练做好准备；启动gadget research模块的文档更新工作。

item.title: 每周总结 2026-W06
item.description: 本周（2026-02-06~07）的工作主要集中在两个方向上：一是对MIHD项目的staig_fusion与原始STAIG之间的ARI性能差距进行了系统的原因分析，识别出五个关键的实现差异，并完成了相关代码层面的优化工作；二是对benchmark工具进行了工程化升级，修复了柱状图渲染方面的错误，实现了GitHub Pages在自动化发布流水线和CLI交互上传功能上的支持。此外，还进行了一次英语托福口语练习（个人学习）。

item.title: 错误日志 2026-02-07
item.description: Today’s AI Dialogue Summary

item.title: bug journal 2026-02-06
item.description: Cross-DCC clusters and TzJsDesktop, the system has diagnosed and quantified the five major performance differences between MIHD staig_fusion and the original STAIG. Additionally, we have completed the engineering delivery of the histogram repair for the benchmark tool, as well as the automatic publishing pipeline via GitHub Pages, along with the CLI-based interactive upload functionality.

item.title: LeetCode Daily Question 2025-12-05
item.description: Solution to 3432. Count Partitions with Even Sum Difference

item.title: 每周总结 2025-W40
item.description: 在本周（2025-W40），只有10月2日这一天有有效的会话记录。这些会话都停留在初始化阶段，用户在打开AutoSeg-SAM2项目的核心跟踪和分割文件后，并未进行实质性的开发工作。因此，本周整体上没有取得任何实质性进展。

item.title: 缺陷日志 2025-10-02
item.description: 在 AutoSeg-SAM2 项目中打开相关的源文件，会话尚未实际开始运行。

item.title: LLM Study
item.description:
Part ChatGPT 4o

ChatGPT 4o API demo

from openai import OpenAI
model_use = "gpt-4o-2024-08-06"
client = OpenAI(api_key="Your-API-key")
completion = client.beta.chat.completions.parse(
	model=model_use,
	messages=[
		{"role": "system", "content": "Extract the event information."},
		{"role": "user", "content": "Alice and Bob are going to a science fair on Friday."},
	],
)
event = completion.choices[0].message.parsed

Note: I tried to use model “gpt-4o” but failed.

How to create ChatGPT API Key

  1. Log in to openai
  2. Use the search bar to search “API keys”
  3. Create a new secret key (Shown only once, invisible after closing the tab)
  4. Go to billing to add some credit to the account

Part UniTox ChatGPT

Read from fda.gov

  1. Read the label of the drug we are interested in from a .csv file.

item.title: LeetCode Daily Question 2025-01-01
item.description: 1422. Maximum Score After Splitting a String

item.title: Random Ideas
item.description:
1. Does the RAM of a laptop continue to consume power even when the screen is turned off?
  2. Images inserted using Markdown do not automatically appear on the website.
  3. Add a checkbox to the “Random” function.
  4. English version of “Desktop Video” √
  5. What is the Duoboy algorithm?
  6. Multilingual support for “Desktop Video” √
  7. What makes a product a luxury item?
  8. Playing “Desktop Video” in the lockscreen mode.
  9. M4 Pro vs. M3 Max

Zijia (Thomas) Tang

Email: zijia.tang@duke.edu | Phone: +1 (858) 340-5757

Interest Areas: Artificial Intelligence, Robotics, AI4Science, Bioinformatics

Education

Duke University | Aug 2024 – Present

  • Major: Computer Science (B.S.)
  • GPA: 4.0 / 4.0
  • Relevant Coursework: Applied Machine Learning, Advanced Algorithms, Linear Algebra

Selected Publications

FLARE: A Failure-Aware Framework for Autonomous Correction and Recovery in VLA Co-First Author | CVPR 2026

  • Addressed the “brittleness” of current Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models where minor perturbations lead to catastrophic failure, aiming to endow robots with human-like resilience.
  • Proposed a novel Retry & Reset paradigm and designed a Perturbation & Bridging augmentation pipeline that systematically decouples robot pose from environment state to resolve In-Distribution (ID) errors.
  • Integrated Gemini-2.5-Pro as an offline failure analyst to mine object-centric “Reset” skills for Out-of-Distribution (OOD) recovery. Implemented using LoRA fine-tuning on Pi_0.5 backbones.
  • Achieved an 84.0% success rate across 9 contact-rich tasks in RoboMimic, outperforming previous SOTA by 26.2%.

scDrugMap: Benchmarking Large Foundation Models for Drug Response Prediction Co-Author | Published in Nature Communications (Impact Factor: 15.7)

item.title: Benchmark
